specific_mechanism: Stemmatic analysis reconstructs original manuscript from variants by tracing copying errors; conjunctive errors group descendants; separative errors distinguish branches
llm_application: LLM chain-of-thought reconstruction from sampled outputs: trace branching reasoning paths via conjunctive errors (shared mistakes) and separative ones; recover the latent 'original' reasoning chain.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes philology adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
